Get me more calls Get more calls More calls

Done for you · Kitchen & bath only

More homeowners calling you in 90 days, or I work for free.

The only thing your business needs to start winning homeowners’ trust and landing more jobs online.

Get me more calls → Free 30-minute call. Kitchen & bath only.

To the business owner sick and tired of waiting for homeowners to walk through your door…

Here’s exactly how you’ll get found and chosen online.

One package, built and run for you every month.

  • A website built to convert. Your kitchens, your reviews, your services, on a site made to turn a homeowner who is just looking into one who calls. You see it before you pay a dollar.
  • Your Google profile, rebuilt and run. The right categories, every service filled in, fresh photos and posts each month, so you climb the map for people searching near you.
  • Local SEO that moves you up. Your site and profile built around what homeowners actually search, so you rise where they’re looking.
  • A steady stream of reviews. Every kitchen you finish becomes another five-star review, the first thing they read before they call.
  • Set up for AI search. When they ask ChatGPT or Google’s AI who to call nearby, you’re one of the names it gives them.

Why this has worked for kitchen and bath businesses like yours.

Homeowners near you are searching right now, ready to spend twenty or thirty thousand dollars this week. To win them, two things have to go right. They have to find you, then your website has to turn them into a call. I handle both.

I get you showing up where they look, then build you a site that shows off your best work and answers their worries, so they stop comparing and call you.

She lands just looking. She leaves ready to call.

Be the next success story.

Get me the whole plan →

The simple steps to getting more calls.

  1. 1

    Click the button and book your call.

    A few quick questions to grab your spot. Takes about a minute.

  2. 2

    Show up to the call.

    We build your plan together and I show you exactly how to become the one homeowners call. You keep the plan either way.

  3. 3

    We get to work.

    I build and run your website, your Google, your reviews, and your AI search, and within ninety days more homeowners are calling you, or I work for free.

Get me more calls → Free. Kitchen and bath only. Keep the plan either way.

The questions a burned owner actually asks.

How is this different from the SEO company that took $1,500 and mailed me charts?

They billed you for effort. I’m on the hook for a result.

They swore they owned Google and sold you rankings nobody controls. I promise the one thing I can actually move, more homeowners finding you and calling than do today, and I put a ninety-day deadline on it.

They locked you in for a year. I earn next month, every month. You see the work every week, and you own every piece of it.

Do you buy me leads?

No. I’m not the Angi game, selling you the same homeowner four other businesses already bought.

I get you the homeowners already searching for your work, by pushing your rankings up so they find you and building the site that turns them into calls once they do.

What I guarantee is the number that matters: more homeowners finding you and calling than do today. Beat that in ninety days, or you stop paying and I keep going.

What happens if it doesn’t work?

Then you don’t pay, and I don’t stop.

Day one, we write down your numbers. Ninety days in, more homeowners are calling than the day we started, or you stop paying and I keep working until that number moves. Still flat three months later? We shake hands and you keep all of it. And I haven’t earned a dollar.

Do I own my website and Google profile?

All of it. Always.

The site, the domain, the Google profile, the photos, the content. It’s yours from day one. Cancel any month and it all walks out the door with you.

I’m slammed on jobs. How much of my time does this take?

Almost none. That’s the point.

I need about an hour up front to learn your business and your work. After that, I do the building. The only thing I ask is that you call back the homeowners who reach out. You’re doing that part anyway.

Why you instead of a regular agency, and why only $750?

Because most agencies run the same playbook for a dentist, a roofer, and you. You’re a template with the logo swapped.

I only do kitchen and bath. I know why a homeowner picks one business over another, what they’re afraid of, and what makes them call. Because it’s the only thing I build, I’m not starting from scratch on your business, which is how the same work that stacks into thousands a month hired out runs $750 with me.

Book my free call → Free. Kitchen and bath only. Keep the plan either way.

In 30 minutes, I’ll show you exactly how.

We’ll build your plan around the things a homeowner checks before she picks anyone: your Google, and your website. I’ll show you the exact moves to become the one she calls, in the right order.

You leave with that plan written down. Run it yourself or hand it to me.

Build my plan → Free. Kitchen and bath only. Keep the plan either way.

— Shane Nguyen, Kitchen Websites
